name: Ars Cafe
tagline: Art gallery meets gelato shop meets espresso bar — a charming post-Diamond Head pit stop with homemade Italian gelato.
mustOrder: Homemade gelato — rotating tropical flavors like lilikoi and haupia
parking: Street parking on Monsarrat Ave. Can be tight on weekends
talkStory: Tucked on Monsarrat Ave near the base of Diamond Head, Ars Cafe is a tiny Italian-style cafe that doubles as an art gallery. The homemade gelato is the star — made fresh daily with tropical flavors you won't find on the mainland. The espresso is solid and the affogato (espresso over gelato) is the perfect post-hike reward. The space is small and charming with rotating art on the walls. Great combined with Diamond Head sunrise hike or a walk through Kapiolani Park.
